title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender should be released in IMAX rather than on Paramount+ — the jaw-dropping animation is easily the best part of the hero's return
summary: But Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender is still such a missed opportunity, both narratively and theatrically. In essence, Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender had been badly done by long before this review embargo had even lifted.
caption: output/2026-07-20/avatar-aang-the-last-airbender-should-be-released-in-imax-rather-than-.txt
